description: Pre-existing on fz-tkf at bd174ea76 (verified via clean worktree): tests/fz2_cli.rs build_executes_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures and run_and_interp_execute_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures fail on fixtures/defstruct_runtime/input.fz with 'error[lower/unbound]: compiler2 lowering found unresolved value Point'. Struct type name resolution regressed somewhere in the fz-rh2.11.7.* quoted-surface authority swap. Blocks any 'full green' gate that includes the fz2_cli integration tests (e.g. fz-knf.5).
title: Compiler2 lowering: defstruct_runtime unresolved value Point
